title: Sausage Skillet
description: A hearty german-inspired sausage skillet with a spicy kick. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: sausage
ingredients.notes: any type of sausage works, such as bratwurst or knockwurst

ingredients.name: fiery peppers
ingredients.notes: such as jalapenos or banana peppers

ingredients.name: garlic
ingredients.notes: optional, but adds depth of flavor

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: use a flaky sea salt for best flavor

ingredients.name: pepper
ingredients.notes: freshly ground black pepper is best

instructions: Heat the skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the sausage from the skillet and set aside.
Add the sliced onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the sliced peppers and cook until tender, about 2 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the sliced potatoes (if using) and cook until they start to brown, about 2 minutes.
Return the sausage to the skillet and stir to combine with the vegetables.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
